name: Nebula Cloud
description: An interactive space-themed nebular cloud with fluid movement.

schema.label: Gas Density
schema.description: Number of particles per color cluster.

schema.label: Smear Brush Size
schema.description: The width of the path you carve when moving the mouse.

schema.label: Click Turbulence
schema.description: Strength of chaotic motion when clicking the cloud.

schema.label: Healing Speed
schema.description: How fast the carved path closes and the cloud reforms.
